title: Show HN: Bento - An entire PowerPoint in one HTML file (edit+view+data+collab)
summary: Bento 是一个创新工具，允许用户在一个 HTML 文件中创建、编辑、查看和协作处理整个 PowerPoint 演示文稿。它集成了编辑、视图、数据和协作功能，简化了演示文稿的制作和分享流程，无需依赖外部软件或复杂设置。
summary_en: Bento is an innovative tool that allows users to create, edit, view, and collaborate on an entire PowerPoint presentation within a single HTML file. It integrates editing, viewing, data, and collaboration features, simplifying the process of making and sharing presentations without relying on external software or complex setups.
